title: pi-context clone — import a substrate from another project as a content-addressed fork
description: A dual-surface command (library cloneSubstrate + Pi tool + CLI + orchestrator script) that copies a source substrate's content (config vocabulary + all blocks + relations.json + objects/) into a destination dir, mints a fresh substrate_id, records a substrate_derived_from_substrate edge to the source, and writes a provenance-bearing registry entry. Fork semantics preserve the one-id<->one-dir invariant. Per DEC-0002.
